highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0 (next) is unreleased; work shown here has not yet shipped.

bullets.lead: Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) fixed
bullets.detail: A native Skia image object was not being released when the crop rectangle overload of FromEncodedData returned a result, causing a memory leak on every call.
